name: io.github.codespar/mcp-twilio
description: MCP server for Twilio — global SMS, WhatsApp, Voice, Verify, and Lookup across 180+ countries

environmentVariables.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
environmentVariables.description: Twilio Account SID (starts with AC...). Used as username for HTTP Basic auth.

environmentVariables.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Twilio Auth Token. Used as password for HTTP Basic auth.

environmentVariables.name: TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default Messaging Service SID (starts with MG...) used for send_message when From is omitted.
